proven.claim: PROVEN: VERSION is a compile-time constant "0.3.0" — always semantically correct
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 130
; PROVEN: VERSION is a compile-time constant "0.3.0" — always semantically correct
(declare-const version_major Int)
(declare-const version_minor Int)
(declare-const version_patch Int)
; Code transition: const VERSION = "0.3.0" — module-scope immutable string
(assert (= version_major 0))
(assert (= version_minor 3))
(assert (= version_patch 0))
; Negation: version is NOT "0.3.0"
(assert (not (and (= version_major 0) (= version_minor 3) (= version_patch 0))))
(check-sat)
